# Meridian Osteopathy

> Meridian Osteopathy is a multidisciplinary clinic in Christchurch, New Zealand, offering osteopathy, acupuncture, and herbal medicine. We are ACC registered — no GP referral is required.

## Clinic details

- Location: 21 Coppell Place, Hillmorton, Christchurch 8025, New Zealand
- Phone: 021 086 55151
- Email: info@meridianosteopathy.co.nz
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9:00am–7:00pm, Sat 9:00am–1:00pm, Sun closed
- Area served: Christchurch, Canterbury, New Zealand
- Pricing: ACC consultations $80–$85; private consultations $115–$120

## Services

- [Osteopathy](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/services/osteopathy/): Hands-on musculoskeletal care for patients of all ages — back and neck pain, headaches, joint pain, pregnancy-related pain, paediatric osteopathy, sports injury.
- [Acupuncture](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/services/acupuncture/): Traditional Chinese Medicine and evidence-based acupuncture for pain, stress, sleep, women's health, fertility, and digestive concerns.
- [Herbal Medicine](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/services/herbal-medicine/): Personalised Traditional Chinese herbal prescriptions for pain, stress, digestive health, and hormonal balance.

## Practitioners

- [Nina Hu](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/team/nina-hu/): Osteopath & Medical Acupuncture
- [Jonathan Grice](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/team/jonathan-grice/): Osteopath & Low Level Laser Therapy
- [Maddison Moffat](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/team/maddison-moffat/): Osteopath
- [Min Jin](https://meridianosteopathy.co.nz/team/min-jin/): Acupuncturist
